message:
🐛 fix(test): correct runtime card config test for chaosMeshStatus (#9959)

The card-configs-runtime.test.ts was checking config.columns (top-level)
but chaosMeshStatusConfig uses content.items (status-grid pattern).
Update assertions to check config.content.items with id+label properties.

Fixes #9958

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
